[F.No. 15/1/2009-BM] By Order and in the Name of the President of India, DHRUV VUAY SINGH, Secy. Footnote: The Principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide number S.O. 46S(E), dated the 24th February, 2010, and subsequently amended vlde number S.O. 652(E), dated the 30th March, 201 I.
